name: Polymarket MCP
description: Discovers and filters Polymarket prediction markets by tags, volume, and liquidity. Analyzes probabilities, market health, and tracks category trends.

skills.name: Market Discovery
skills.description: Searches and filters Polymarket prediction markets by tags, category, volume, and liquidity in real time.

skills.name: Market Analysis
skills.description: Returns current probabilities, market health scores, and recent trade activity for individual Polymarket events.

skills.name: Trend Tracking
skills.description: Scans Polymarket categories to identify trending markets and compare sentiment shifts across time windows.
